probe.stderr:
RIT Research Computing resources are for the use of authorized
users only. By using these resources, you acknowledge that you have 
read and comply with RIT's Code of Conduct for Computer and Network 
Use[1], RIT's Information Security Policy and Standards[2], and Research
Computing's Acceptable Use Policy (AUP)[3].

Use of this computer system is subject to monitoring and recording by 
system personnel. Anyone using this system expressly consents to such 
monitoring and recording. Any evidence of criminal activity or 
violation of policy may be provided to the appropriate officials 
and/or law enforcement.

[1]: https://www.rit.edu/policies/c082
[2]: https://www.rit.edu/policies/c081
[3]: https://policy.rc.rit.edu
